creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
Hi,

Your old distfiles are wrong and longer than the ones on the master
site, so fetch couldn't fix it by resuming transfer.  If you make
distclean and fetch again, they should match the original checksum in
the distinfo.  The patch is not needed and should not be committed.

-- llwang

On Tue, Feb 1, 2011 at 3:06 AM, Mars G Miro <spry@anarchy.in.the.ph> wrote:
> Hi
>
>
> =C2=A0This is what happens w/ an updated ports tree:
> ++++++++++++++++++++++
> root@spry82RC:/home/ports/math/py-numpy# make build
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Found saved configuration for py26-numpy-1.3.0_2,1
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Extracting for py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum OK for numpy-1.5.1.tar.gz.
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for numpy-ref.pdf.
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for numpy-user.pdf.
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Refetch for 1 more times files: numpy-ref.pdf numpy-user=
.pdf
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Found saved configuration for py26-numpy-1.3.0_2,1
> =3D> numpy-ref.pdf doesn't seem to exist in /usr/distfiles/.
> =3D> Attempting to fetch from http://docs.scipy.org/doc/numpy-1.5.x/.
> fetch: http://docs.scipy.org/doc/numpy-1.5.x/numpy-ref.pdf: Requested
> Range Not Satisfiable
> =3D> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/dis=
tfiles/.
> fetch: numpy-ref.pdf: local file (6645864 bytes) is longer than remote
> file (5865550 bytes)
> =3D> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
> =3D> port manually into /usr/distfiles/ and try again.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /home/ports/math/py-numpy.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /home/ports/math/py-numpy.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /home/ports/math/py-numpy.
>
> ++++++++++++++++++++++
>
> So I updated distinfo from the site, made the patch, and it builds fine:
>
> ++++++++++++++++++++++
> root@spry82RC:/home/mars/py-numpy# make build
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Found saved configuration for py26-numpy-1.3.0_2,1
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Extracting for py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum OK for numpy-1.5.1.tar.gz.
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum OK for numpy-ref.pdf.
> =3D> SHA256 Checksum OK for numpy-user.pdf.
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Patching for py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Applying FreeBSD patches for py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0 py26-numpy-1.5.1,1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/pyth=
on2.6 - found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0 py26-numpy-1.5.1,1 depends on executable: gcc45 - found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0 py26-numpy-1.5.1,1 depends on shared library: lapack.4 =
- found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0 py26-numpy-1.5.1,1 depends on shared library: blas.2 - =
found
> =3D=3D=3D> =C2=A0Configuring for py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
> Running from numpy source directory.F2PY Version 1
> blas_opt_info:
> blas_mkl_info:
> /home/tmp_ports/home/mars/py-numpy/work/numpy-1.5.1/numpy/distutils/syste=
m_info.py:527:
> UserWarning: Specified path /usr/local/include/suitesparse is invalid.
> =C2=A0warnings.warn('Specified path %s is invalid.' % d)
> =C2=A0libraries mkl,vml,guide not found in /usr/lib
> =C2=A0libraries mkl,vml,guide not found in /usr/local/lib
> =C2=A0libraries mkl,vml,guide not found in
> /usr/local/lib/gcc45/gcc/x86_64-portbld-freebsd8.1/4.5.3/../../../
> =C2=A0NOT AVAILABLE
>
> ....
>
>
>
> --
> cheers
> mars
> -----
>
